title: Construction Triage
summary: Help the player reason about paused builds, missing logs/planks, builders, paths, and priorities.
promptGuidelines: Use deterministic resource summaries for logs, planks, and water instead of mental arithmetic.
Check speed/day/context before advising the player to wait.
For unreachable construction, route to building.pathing.
Before placement, show a four-button confirmation menu with yes and no choices.

starterMenu.question: What construction issue should Pi inspect?
